1.name: MoveDNA Buyer Assessment
1.webTitle: Beyond the Bedrooms and Baths: Discover Your Buyer MoveDNA™
1.introText: Real estate isn't just a financial transaction - it's a psychological one. Take our 3-minute behavioral assessment to uncover your dominant real estate buyer archetype.

questions.text: I evaluate properties primarily using historical appreciation, market trends, and verifiable metrics.
I can easily look past outdated cosmetics or ugly wallpaper to imagine a home's aesthetic potential.
I view the real estate market like a high-stakes chess match where speed, efficiency, and leverage win.
It is vital to me that my co-buyers, family, and the community feel completely aligned and harmonious.
I care deeply about immaculate structural mechanics and thorough inspection report validation.
Finding a home that serves as an authentic expression of my personal identity and vision is a top priority.
I am completely unfazed by fast-moving markets or aggressive multiple-offer bidding scenarios.
I would rather take a slow, consultative approach than rush a process and risk relationship friction.
I have a high susceptibility to "analysis paralysis" because I prefer 100% factual certainty.
I am highly willing to purchase a "diamond in the rough" and manage cosmetic contractor updates.
I value transaction velocity, clean terms, and getting straight to the point over extended deliberation.
I actively avoid contract confrontations and want all parties in a deal to feel respected and heard.
A property's financial track record and risk mitigation outweigh its emotional or historical charm.
When touring a home, I focus entirely on the future lifestyle memories we can build inside its space.
I am hyper-decisive under pressure and expect immediate response times from my advisory team.
A home's day-to-day community integration and local neighborhood feel are its most critical parameters.

routing.heading: The Analytical Architect
routing.details: Hey Strategist! Your results show that you treat the real estate search with a sharp, brilliant eye for detail. You don't buy homes based on a fleeting 'gut feeling'—you rely on historical charts, solid market metrics, and structural facts.
routing.additionalDetails: Joe's Coaching Blueprint For You: Your winning strategy is using numbers as our shield. We will structure clean, logical offers that look past open-market hype, cutting straight to the physical mechanics of the home to make sure your offer represents incredible value.

routing.heading: The Passionate Visionary
routing.details: Hey Dreamer! Your results show that you possess an incredible gift for seeing beyond what a house is, straight to what it can become. You aren't scared away by outdated kitchens or bad paint. Instead, you are looking for architectural character, layout versatility, and a canvas where your family can build lifelong memories.
routing.additionalDetails: Joe's Coaching Blueprint For You: We will focus our search on neighborhood culture, versatile floor plans, and lifestyle storytelling. By pairing your creative eye with my sharp cost-validation buffers, we'll locate a home with great bones that you can transform into a masterpiece.

routing.heading: The Power Player
routing.details: Hey Closer! Your results reveal that you treat the real estate market like a high-stakes chess match. You crave transaction efficiency, demand hyper-velocity, and play to win. When you spot a great asset, you don't hesitate or stall—you strike aggressively with ultra-clean terms designed to outmaneuver the competition instantly.
routing.additionalDetails: Joe's Coaching Blueprint For You: Our winning play is speed and execution precision. We will structure offers that sellers cannot refuse because of pure velocity and ironclad financial terms. I will balance your intensity with strategic charm to ensure the listing agent fights for our offer.

routing.heading: The Harmony Seeker
routing.details: Hey Connector! Your results show that you treat a home search with a beautiful, deeply human perspective. For you, a home isn't just wood and brick—it's a sanctuary for relationships, peace, and family alignment. You evaluate properties based on their day-to-day livability and neighborhood community feel, wanting everyone involved in the process to feel trusted, respected, and heard.
routing.additionalDetails: Joe's Coaching Blueprint For You: Our winning path is collaborative communication. We will combine consultative guidance with detailed neighborhood integration data to find your pocket of peace. When writing offers, we'll craft win-win terms that sellers feel incredibly respected accepting.

2.name: MoveDNA Seller Assessment
2.webTitle: Beyond the Bedrooms and Baths: Discover Your Seller MoveDNA™
2.introText: Real estate isn't just a financial transaction - it's a psychological one. Take our 3-minute behavioral assessment to uncover your dominant real estate seller archetype.

questions.text: I evaluate my property's market value strictly through absorption rates, hard data, and local comps.
My home holds significant personal history and treasured memories that I want a new buyer to honor.
I am fully bought into high-end staging and aggressive marketing to intentionally trigger a massive bidding war.
Minimizing daily lifestyle disruption, showings, and open house chaos is more important to me than fighting for every penny.
I demand a systematic, objective listing timeline backed by meticulous home maintenance files.
It matters immensely to me that my home transitions to a worthy caretaker who genuine appreciates its craftsmanship.
My ultimate objective is shattering local neighborhood price records and maximizing my net proceed check.
I strongly dislike intrusive showings, complex buyer repair lists, and unpredictable closing schedules.
I tend to discount psychological staging, assuming buyers evaluate homes purely on a cold square-footage calculation.
I believe my home's architectural character and unique soul are worth a substantial premium over generic area comps.
I am highly competitive and completely comfortable navigating tooth-and-nail contract updates or inspections.
I want a quiet, seamless, white-glove listing process that completely shields my daily routine from transaction stress.
I treat the sale of my property strictly as a logical liquidation of an asset rather than an emotional farewell.
I want a rich, narrative-driven marketing layout that showcases the unique history and soul of our house.
I view my home as a product to be aggressively staged, optimized, and masterfully negotiated for pure ROI leverage.
I would gladly accept highly certain, pre-vetted or off-market corporate terms quickly just to bypass transaction friction.

routing.heading: The Analytical Optimizer
routing.details: Hey Mathematician! Your results indicate that you view the sale of your home with a refreshing, analytical clarity. You don't guess at numbers or lean on high-pressure listing fluff—you evaluate success using local comps, regional absorption trends, and clear structural data. You crave a highly systematic listing timeline that eliminates manual operational errors from day one.
routing.additionalDetails: Joe's Coaching Blueprint For You: Our winning play is removing guesswork from the market. By presenting a pristine, data-documented, pre-inspected home to the open market, we will command a massive premium and easily shut down lowball repair negotiations before they start.

routing.heading: The Sentimental Steward
routing.details: Hey Guardian! Your results reveal that you share a deep, beautiful bond with the history and craftsmanship of your home. For them, selling isn't just about liquidating an asset - it’s about passing a treasured legacy on to the next worthy caretaker. You look for a buyer who will value the property's unique soul.
routing.additionalDetails: Joe's Coaching Blueprint For You: We will craft a rich, narrative-driven lifestyle marketing campaign that highlights the unique character and warmth of your home. Our winning strategy is capturing the imagination of premium emotional buyers who are gladly willing to pay a massive pricing premium for a property with true soul.

routing.heading: The Strategic Maximizer
routing.details: Hey Champion! Your results demonstrate that you view your home as a premium financial asset to be masterfully leveraged. You are fully bought into high-end staging, cinematic marketing presentation, and aggressive negotiation plays. You don't just want to sell—you want to shatter neighborhood pricing records and walk away with the largest net proceed check possible.
routing.additionalDetails: Joe's Coaching Blueprint For You: We will transform your home into an aspirational premium product. Through aggressive strategic list pricing, premium professional staging layouts, and high-impact digital campaign syndication budgets, we'll spark intense competitive urgency among buyers.

routing.heading: The Hassle-Free Homeowner
routing.details: Hey Expert! Your results reveal that you place a premium on transaction convenience, lifestyle tranquility, and speed. You despise intrusive open houses, endless showings, and back-and-forth repair arguments. For you, a clean, certain close with a clear timeline beats fighting over the last penny every single time.
routing.additionalDetails: Joe's Coaching Blueprint For You: We will design a white-glove concierge listing process tailored entirely to your personal schedule. By utilizing highly structured showing windows, pre-vetted solid buyers, or swift corporate institutional routes, we will finalize a premium sale with absolute peace of mind.

3.name: Seattle Ferry Route Quiz
3.webTitle: Which Seattle Ferry Route Matches Your Vibe?
3.introText: Are you a polished commuter or a rugged island adventurer? Escape the gridlock and take our 3-minute psychographic test to discover your true Puget Sound nautical identity.
3.emailSubject: Your Official Puget Sound Commuter Identity Asset

questions.text: My ideal Saturday involves boutique shopping, wine tasting rooms, and an upscale walkable downtown waterfront.
I have a deep fascination with naval history, shipyard mechanics, and watching massive industrial vessels pass by.
I love eccentric art installations, local organic farming cooperatives, and living completely off the traditional grid.
I am constantly looking out for whale sightings, hidden coastal hiking trails, and rugged old-growth pine forests.
I prefer a quick, highly reliable, polished transit commute over an extended winding maritime journey.
I find profound peace in a long, wide-open scenic voyage across the deep saltwater sound to disconnect from city noise.
I am fiercely protective of independent, small-town local businesses and community-supported cooperatives.
My vehicle is almost always packed with camping gear, kayak paddles, or hiking boots ready for a mountain trail escape.
I value having immediate access to premium espresso bars and fine dining selections right off the dock terminal.
I am completely unfazed by rough winter waters, heavy maritime fog, or deep industrial wind gusts.
I would rather attend an intimate backyard acoustic jam session than a high-end corporate city networking event.
I enjoy exploring historic coastal military forts, historic lighthouses, and state park beaches.

routing.heading: The Bainbridge Island Route
routing.details: You belong on the iconic Bainbridge run! You appreciate the finer elements of the Pacific Northwest lifestyle: scenic sound crossings paired seamlessly with world-class wineries, boutique art galleries, and a beautiful walkable waterfront downtown district. You make transit look effortlessly high-end.
routing.additionalDetails: Joe's Real Estate Micro-Insight: Bainbridge Island offers the ultimate marriage of estate-grade luxury acreage and immediate high-speed ferry connectivity to downtown Seattle. If you value top-tier school systems, historic farm properties, and pristine security without losing city accessibility, let's explore the island's premier hidden custom listings.

routing.heading: The Bremerton Voyage
routing.details: You match the historic, rugged energy of the Bremerton run! You don't mind a longer, deeply immersive hour-long cruise through the rich, winding waters of Rich Passage. You have a profound appreciation for naval history, maritime mechanics, and the hardworking industrial soul of the sound.
routing.additionalDetails: Joe's Real Estate Micro-Insight: Kitsap County—specifically the neighborhoods surrounding the Bremerton and Port Orchard terminals—represents one of the absolute strongest equity-growth plays in the region. You can acquire expansive water-view properties for a fraction of King County pricing, while capitalizing on direct passenger-only fast ferry routes straight into downtown Seattle.

routing.heading: The Vashon Island Route
routing.details: You belong on the creative, independent Vashon run! You favor local farm stands, quirky artist collectives, and total privacy over manicured suburban subdivisions. For you, the ferry isn't just a commute—it's a protective moat that keeps the busy outside world at bay.
routing.additionalDetails: Joe's Real Estate Micro-Insight: Vashon Island is a world entirely its own, perfect for historic farmhouses, architectural mid-century modern beach cabins, and private equestrian estates. If your vision involves true homesteading, forest canopies, or a private shoreline sanctuary while working remotely, Vashon's inventory is unmatched.

routing.heading: The Whidbey & San Juan Routes
routing.details: You match the untamed, breathtaking energy of the northern Sound routes! Your eyes are permanently glued to the horizon watching for resident orca pods, bald eagles, and hidden shoreline coves. You are happiest when the ferry deck acts as your launching pad to coastal hiking trails, old-growth forests, and historic state park campgrounds.
routing.additionalDetails: Joe's Real Estate Micro-Insight: The northern passages surrounding Whidbey Island, Fidalgo Island (Anacortes), and the San Juans hold the crown jewel properties of Washington's coastlines. From dramatic saltwater bluff estates to cozy cabin hideaways nestled in the pines, these areas are perfect for an intentional lifestyle shift or a legacy vacation asset.

4.name: Edmonds Dinner Quiz
4.webTitle: Which Edmonds restaurant should I go to for dinner tonight?
4.introText: Craving a delicious night out in Edmonds but can't decide where to go? Whether you want waterfront seafood, upscale steaks, bold Asian fusion, or wood-fired Italian, take our quick lifestyle assessment to discover your perfect culinary match!
4.emailSubject: Your Perfect Edmonds Dinner Match is Ready!

questions.text: I love a trendy, upscale atmosphere where I can enjoy fresh local oysters and a premium hand-cut steak.
I am in the mood for an iconic waterfront view of the Puget Sound and watching the Washington State ferries pass by.
I'm craving modern, bold Asian-fusion comfort food like scratch-made dumplings and craft cocktails with exotic spices.
I prefer a vibrant, chic downtown bistro that offers handmade artisan pasta with a Pacific Northwest twist.
My ideal dinner involves a sophisticated evening out with fine wines, elegant decor, and top-tier hospitality.
I want a quintessential Northwest seafood dinner featuring fresh local catches, clam chowder, and a relaxed beachside vibe.
I enjoy cozy neighborhood gems tucked away from the main drag that offer an innovative, plant-friendly or fusion menu.
I'm looking for a beautifully designed dining space with wood-fired flavors, a seasonal menu, and a great outdoor patio.

routing.heading: Salt & Iron
routing.details: You belong at Salt & Iron! Located in the heart of Downtown Edmonds along the Fourth Avenue Arts Corridor, this chic eatery features fresh local oysters from Taylor Shellfish, premium steaks, and outstanding Pacific Northwest dishes.
routing.additionalDetails: Perfect for a special occasion or an elevated date night. Don't miss out on their craft cocktails and local wine list. Pro tip: reserve a table in advance, or enjoy their delightful weekend brunch if you can't wait for dinner!

routing.heading: Anthony's HomePort Edmonds
routing.details: Your perfect match is Anthony's HomePort! Situated right on the Edmonds waterfront, it offers a quintessential PNW experience with sweeping views of the Olympic Mountains, Puget Sound, and passing Washington State ferries.
routing.additionalDetails: Enjoy fresh Northwest seafood sourced from local fishermen. Whether you sit upstairs for an elevated dinner or downstairs at the casual Beach Cafe, it's the ultimate coastal vibe. Try their award-winning clam chowder and seasonal wild salmon.

routing.heading: Bar Dojo
routing.details: You should head to Bar Dojo tonight! This beloved neighborhood gem at Five Corners offers a delicious melting pot of Asian comfort foods blended with Northwest ingredients, including an incredible plant-based selection.
routing.additionalDetails: Famous for its Ahi Tuna Tacos, Birria Ramen, and scratch-made dumplings, Bar Dojo pairs its bold flavors with hand-crafted cocktails using Asian-inspired fruits and spices. It's warm, intimate, and packed with flavor.

routing.heading: Fire & The Feast
routing.details: Your ideal dinner destination is Fire & The Feast! Steps from the iconic Edmonds fountain on Main Street, this vibrant restaurant delivers traditional Italian craftsmanship fused with seasonal Pacific Northwest freshness.
routing.additionalDetails: Indulge in handmade artisan pasta, wood-fired pizzas, and rotating seasonal specials. Their beautiful outdoor patio is spectacular for fair-weather dining, and the lively, stylish indoor space is perfect for a memorable night out.
